feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached Celadon Rocket Hideout B2F.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red marked the Rocket patrol route and warned Antman that B2F is the first floor built to call reinforcements.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill identified a stolen Silph Scope crate whose signal matches Lavender and Pokemon Tower.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Rocket Hideout B2F patrol battle is unlocked.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Gold Dust is clashing with Rocket over a hidden ledger and coin cache on B2F.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight control-room interference is disrupting Rocket's lower-floor route system.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Lift Key route points toward B3F instead of resolving on B2F.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The B2F Rocket patrol has been cleared.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket Hideout B3F is unlocked as the next Celadon dungeon step.
